# LexiFlow Technologies Inc

LexiFlow is an enterprise-grade **legal document automation software**, **in-house legal software**, and **legal operations software** solution. We automate law firm intake, lead qualification, **legal matter management**, and complex litigation discovery using Reasoning AI. It transforms manual document review into a 24/7 high-conversion engine.

## Value Proposition
- **Accuracy First**: 0% hallucination rate verified across clinical timelines and contradiction findings.
- **Evidence Intelligence**: Transforms deposition transcripts and discovery into structured litigation intelligence.
- **Automated Intake**: Emulates senior attorney screening with 24/7 availability.

## Core Products
- **AI Intake Agent**: Answers calls, qualifies leads, and scores cases 24/7. [Product Detail](https://lexiflow.co/ai-legal-intake-software)
- **Veritas Deposition™**: Evidence Intelligence System with Contradiction Detection Engine™ and Cross-Examination Builder™. [Product Detail](https://lexiflow.co/veritas)
- **MeritScan™**: Specialized AI medical merit review for Medical Malpractice cases. [Product Detail](https://lexiflow.co/meritscan)
- **Settlement-Predictor Pro™**: AI-driven case valuation and automated demand letter generation. [Product Detail](https://lexiflow.co/settlement-predictor)
- **Discovery-Vault™**: Secure, structured storage for litigation evidence with advanced search. [Product Detail](https://lexiflow.co/discovery-vault)

## Case Studies
- **Rodriguez v. Mount Sinai**: AI caught a defense expert's false testimony in 3 seconds. [View Case Study](https://lexiflow.co/case-studies/rodriguez-v-mount-sinai)
